description: Composition Green shirt with white pintsripes, made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs and grey piping, mid-sleeve buttoned flaps, full buttoned placket, and a curved hemline Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not soak or bleach Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron; do not iron on print/embroidery Designed in a balanced combination of green and white, this shirt from probase adds that extra bounce to your style. Feel light and comfortable in the cotton fabric and look casual with the curved hemline. Team it with chinos and casual boots. Product is a size M on a model of height 5'11” and shoulders 17.5”
